raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The proposed 2021-22 State Budget will provide critical aid to Californians struggling during the pandemic.",
    "An additional $575 million is allocated to the California Small Business COVID-19 Relief Grant program, raising total funds for small businesses to over $1 billion.",
    "The budget will distribute $2.4 billion in rapid cash payments to individuals and working families with the greatest need.",
    "Fee waivers to individuals and businesses will total $70.6 million.",
    "The budget includes an extension of current statewide eviction protections.",
    "The state needs to prioritize landlord and tenant mediation programs, including legal aid services, to resolve tenant-landlord disputes.",
    "There are projections of unresolved shortfalls between landlords and tenants."
  ]
}
```
